nomads.name: The Comeback Trail
nomads.description: Steppe Nomads survive bad positions through escape routes, Dash timing, Dust Veil bait, and Sandstorm lane denial.

levels.name: Open Road Escape
levels.hook: A scout has a safe retreat lane. The lesson is simple: Nomads can step backward before the enemy net closes.
levels.objective: Use Open Roads to retreat, watch Amber overextend, then finish the live board.
levels.hint: Select c3 and move backward to d2.
levels.clearMessage: Open Roads proved the Nomads can retreat, reset the angle, and keep tempo.

levels.name: Dash Raid
levels.hook: Amber left targets hanging around the center. A single rider can Dash into the pocket.
levels.objective: Use Dash to create a capture chain.
levels.hint: Press the ultimate, choose c1, Dash to e3, then capture.
levels.clearMessage: Dash inserted a rider behind the screen and opened a winning capture corridor.

levels.name: Dust Veil Bait
levels.hook: Amber has a capture ready on the center lane. Dust Veil absorbs the strike.
levels.objective: Trigger Dust Veil, block the capture, then counterattack.
levels.hint: Move c3 to d4, then counter-capture.
levels.clearMessage: Dust Veil protected the bait piece long enough to counter-capture.

levels.name: Sandstorm Gate
levels.hook: Amber controls both exits. Sandstorm closes the landing squares.
levels.objective: Use Sandstorm Corridor to freeze the lane.
levels.hint: Block e5 and g5, then capture through the gate.
levels.clearMessage: Sandstorm froze the guard long enough for a clean breakthrough.

levels.name: Caravan Free Duel
levels.hook: The lessons are done. Amber has more pieces, but the Nomads have tempo.
levels.objective: Win a live match using the Nomads toolkit.
levels.hint: Use Open Roads and Dash to keep tempo.
levels.clearMessage: The Nomads campaign is clear.

iron_guard.name: Iron Bastion Trials
iron_guard.description: Iron Guard missions teach protected center entries, Fortify denial, revenge tempo, and temporary walls.

levels.name: Shield Anchor
levels.hook: Shield Wall makes the first center entry safe.
levels.objective: Move into the center to trigger Shield Wall.
levels.hint: Move b2 to c3.
levels.clearMessage: Shield Wall created a safe center anchor.

levels.name: Fortify Break
levels.hook: Amber threatens a multi-jump through the center guard.
levels.objective: Use Fortify on d4.
levels.hint: Arm Fortify and choose d4.
levels.clearMessage: Fortify cancelled the multi-jump.

levels.name: Vengeance Turn
levels.hook: Amber wins the first trade, but the ledger makes the next capture valuable.
levels.objective: Recover from a material loss.
levels.hint: Your next capture after losing a piece fuels the comeback.
levels.clearMessage: Vengeance Ledger turned a loss into a resource.

levels.name: Barricade Gate
levels.hook: Amber's attack depends on two landing squares.
levels.objective: Use Barricade to deny the route.
levels.hint: Block e5 and g5.
levels.clearMessage: Barricade created a temporary fortress.

levels.name: Bastion Free Duel
levels.hook: No more rails. Win by defensive trades.
levels.objective: Win a live match using Iron Guard tools.
levels.hint: Hold center, Fortify the key defender, and trade safely.
levels.clearMessage: The Iron Guard campaign is clear.

sun_court.name: Solar Crownline
sun_court.description: Sun Court missions teach promotion pressure, instant kings, Crown Tax comeback tempo, and long diagonal capture bursts.

levels.name: Royal Lane
levels.hook: One runner can reach the royal lane before material matters.
levels.objective: Convert Royal Pressure into Momentum.
levels.hint: Advance the runner and protect the promotion route.
levels.clearMessage: Royal Pressure made the crown lane matter.

levels.name: Solar Crown Engine
levels.hook: Crown Surge turns a mid-board courier into a king.
levels.objective: Use Crown Surge on d4.
levels.hint: Arm Crown Surge and choose d4.
levels.clearMessage: Crown Surge made an instant king.

levels.name: Crown Tax
levels.hook: Amber promotes first, but the tax funds your response.
levels.objective: Survive the enemy promotion and counterattack.
levels.hint: The first enemy king gives you Momentum.
levels.clearMessage: Crown Tax transformed enemy promotion into your comeback.

levels.name: Sun Lance Return
levels.hook: The winning capture sits beyond normal reach.
levels.objective: Use Sun Lance to make the long diagonal capture.
levels.hint: Arm Sun Lance on e5, then capture e5xb2 over d4.
levels.clearMessage: Sun Lance created a long diagonal strike.

levels.name: Coronation Free Duel
levels.hook: The rival bot will race for kings if you wait.
levels.objective: Win a live match using Sun Court tools.
levels.hint: Create a runner, Crown Surge early, and punish backward gaps.
levels.clearMessage: The Sun Court campaign is clear.

void_order.name: Void Order Archive
void_order.description: Void Order missions teach danger conversion, marked traps, range-3 Phase Shift teleports, and Collapse lane denial.

levels.name: Pressure Field
levels.hook: Void Order turns danger into fuel.
levels.objective: Bait a threat and trigger Pressure Field.
levels.hint: The field converts threat into resource.
levels.clearMessage: Pressure Field made danger profitable.

levels.name: Echo Mark
levels.hook: Amber's quiet move becomes a debt.
levels.objective: Hunt the marked piece.
levels.hint: Track the first quiet move and capture it.
levels.clearMessage: Echo Mark turned a quiet escape into a target.

levels.name: Rift Step
levels.hook: Phase Shift teleports through the trap and opens the line.
levels.objective: Use range-3 Phase Shift from c3 to f6.
levels.hint: Land on f6, then capture f6xh8 over g7.
levels.clearMessage: Phase Shift bent the geometry into a winning capture chain.

levels.name: Collapse Gate
levels.hook: Amber's plan requires one exact landing square.
levels.objective: Use Collapse on e5.
levels.hint: Void e5 before Amber can use it.
levels.clearMessage: Collapse erased the enemy's landing square.

levels.name: Archive Free Duel
levels.hook: No more script. Win by bending movement.
levels.objective: Win a live match using Void Order tools.
levels.hint: Phase Shift should create a tactic, not just move a piece.
levels.clearMessage: The Void campaign is clear.
